title: O, It Was Out By Donnycarney
content:
O, it was out by Donnycarney
    When the bat flew from tree to tree
    My love and I did walk together;
    And sweet were the words she said to me.

    Along with us the summer wind
    Went murmuring, O, happily!
    But softer than the breath of summer
    Was the kiss she gave to me.
meaning:
James Joyce's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "O, It Was Out By Donnycarney"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
